root.name: Add Team Member to Contributors Slide
root.description: Evaluates whether 'Dr. Sarah Johnson' with role 'Pediatric Ophthalmologist' was successfully added to slide 1 (contributors slide) without causing unintended changes

children.name: Core Task Completion
children.description: Verifies that the specified team member was correctly added to slide 1 with proper name and role

children.name: Team Member Added to Slide 1
children.description: Checks if 'Dr. Sarah Johnson' was added to slide 1 (contributors slide)

children.name: Correct Role Assignment
children.description: Verifies that 'Pediatric Ophthalmologist' role is associated with Dr. Sarah Johnson

children.name: Visual Integration
children.description: Assesses if the new team member is visually integrated well with existing contributors using screenshot comparison

children.name: No Unintended Changes
children.description: Ensures that no unintended modifications were made to other slides or slide elements

children.name: Other Slides Unchanged
children.description: Verifies that slides other than slide 1 were not modified

children.name: No Unintended Animations or Transitions
children.description: Checks that no animations or transitions were unintentionally added, removed, or modified

scorer.function_code:
def compute_score() -> tuple[str, float]:
    # Count animation and transition changes
    animation_changes = (len(ppt_diff.added_animations) + 
                        len(ppt_diff.removed_animations) + 
                        len(ppt_diff.modified_animations))
    
    transition_changes = (len(ppt_diff.added_transitions) + 
                         len(ppt_diff.removed_transitions) + 
                         len(ppt_diff.modified_transitions))
    
    total_changes = animation_changes + transition_changes
    
    if total_changes == 0:
        return "No unintended animation or transition changes detected", 1.0
    else:
        # Small penalty for each unintended change
        penalty = min(1.0, total_changes * 0.1)  # 0.1 penalty per change
        score = max(0.0, 1.0 - penalty)
        return f"Found {total_changes} unintended animation/transition changes (animations: {animation_changes}, transitions: {transition_changes})", score

metadata.task: Add a new team member to the contributors slide (slide 1) with the name 'Dr. Sarah Johnson' and role 'Pediatric Ophthalmologist'
